_comment: Model routing policy v7 — 2026-03-17. MiniMax=L1 conversation, Qwen=routing+researcher+engineer, GLM=writer+reviewer, Ollama=publisher+admin+internal tasks.

agent_model_map._comment: Per-agent model assignment for Step execution.

l1_routing_model._comment: Routing decision (DAG planning, agent selection) uses Qwen for reasoning quality. Separate from L1 conversation model.

task_model_map._comment: Internal tasks routed to local models. These override agent_model_map.

embedding_model._comment: Primary: local nomic-embed-text (768d, 47ms). Fallback: zhipu embedding-3 (1024d).

budget_limits._comment: MiniMax: -1 = Coding Plan. Qwen/Zhipu: per-token daily caps. Ollama: unlimited (local).
